description:
🌼 KEY FEATURES 🖼️ Custom Wall Tapestry
Made from 100% high-quality polyester fabric with one-sided printing, this tapestry combines lightweight durability with a smooth texture—perfect for any room or occasion.
🌸 Soft & Durable Polyester Fabric – Crafted from premium polyester fleece, the fabric feels soft yet sturdy, offering wrinkle resistance and lasting color vibrancy.
🎨 Vibrant Print Options – Personalize your tapestry with your own design or choose from stunning patterns!
🏖️ Multi-Purpose Use – Perfect as a wall hanging, but also great as a beach towel, picnic mat, tablecloth, or outdoor decoration.
🧼 Easy to Care For – Hand wash or machine wash on a gentle cycle. Iron at a low temperature if needed. ❌ Do not bleach.
